title: thelypteris leptocladia
intro: Thelypteris leptocladia, also known as the chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris leptocladia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Thelypteris leptocladia can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions.
